problems.title: Common Washing Machine Problems We Fix
problems.description: We diagnose and repair all common washing machine issues. Here are some problems we handle daily.

notSpinning.title: Machine Not Spinning
notSpinning.desc: Clothes remain soaking wet after wash cycle. Often caused by belt or motor issues. We fix it quickly.

waterLeak.title: Water Leaking
waterLeak.desc: Water leaks during or after washing. Caused by damaged hose or seal issues. Professional repair required.

noise.title: Unusual Noises
noise.desc: Grinding, squeaking, or rattling sounds during operation. Usually indicates bearing or drum problems.

notStarting.title: Machine Won't Start
notStarting.desc: Power issues or control panel failures. Our technicians diagnose and fix electrical problems.

defaultContent.paragraph1: This comprehensive guide provides detailed information about appliance repair and maintenance. Our expert technicians have compiled years of hands-on experience to bring you the most effective tips, solutions, and preventive measures for keeping your appliances in optimal condition.
defaultContent.paragraph2: Whether you're dealing with a refrigerator issue, washing machine problems, or AC malfunctions, understanding the basics of maintenance and troubleshooting can save you time and money. Regular maintenance not only extends the life of your appliances but also ensures they operate at peak efficiency.
defaultContent.paragraph3: For professional assistance with your appliances, don't hesitate to contact our team of certified technicians. We're available 24/7 to help you with any repair needs, offering same-day service and competitive pricing across Riyadh.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | Riyadh Appliance Repair Services
seo.description: Privacy Policy for Riyadh Appliance Repair Services. Learn how we protect your personal information and data.
seo.keywords: privacy policy, data protection, personal information

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Riyadh Repair Services respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect the information you share with us.

infoCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
infoCollect.content: We may collect personal details such as your name, phone number, email address, and location for booking and communication purposes. We may also collect non-identifying technical data (e.g., browser type, device information) through cookies and analytics tools.

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.content: Your information is used to schedule repairs, provide customer support, send service updates, process payments, and improve our website and services. We may also use your email for marketing if you opt in; you can unsubscribe at any time.

dataProtection.title: 3. Data Protection
dataProtection.content: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your data. Access to personal information is restricted to authorized personnel only. However, no system is 100% secure—please take care when sharing sensitive information online.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies & Third-Party Services
cookies.content: We use cookies and third-party services (e.g., EmailJS, analytics, mapping services) that may collect limited information to provide and improve functionality. These third parties have their own privacy policies — we recommend reviewing them.

sharing.title: 5. Sharing & Disclosure
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with trusted service providers who assist in delivering our services (for example, payment processors or technicians). We may also disclose information when required by law.

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights
yourRights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal information. To do so, contact us at the email below. We will respond in accordance with applicable laws.

children.title: 7. Children
children.content: Our services are not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or want to request access/deletion, contact us at

seo.title: Terms & Conditions | Riyadh Appliance Repair Services
seo.description: Terms and Conditions for using Riyadh Appliance Repair Services. Read our service terms and policies.
seo.keywords: terms of service, conditions, service agreement

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Riyadh Repair Services. By accessing or using our website, you agree to comply with the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before using our services.

services.title: 1. Services
services.content: We provide appliance repair and maintenance services across Riyadh. All appointments and repairs are subject to availability and technician confirmation.

payments.title: 2. Payments
payments.content: All payments must be made as agreed during booking. Prices may vary depending on the type of appliance, issue severity, and required parts.

warranty.title: 3. Warranty
warranty.content: Some repairs may include a limited warranty period as stated at the time of service. Damages caused by misuse or external factors are not covered.

liability.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Riyadh Repair Services will not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services.

changes.title: 5. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to update these Terms of Service at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page.
